title: botrychium matricariifolium subsp. rutifolium
intro: Botrychium matricariifolium subsp. rutifolium, also known as the autumn fern or rattlesnake fern, is a type of rare and endangered fern species native to North America. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as wounds, infections, and digestive problems. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and aid in the healing process of wounds and injuries. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
